title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
